200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, disarms a random enemy for 3 sec and deals 55000 damage to them over that period of time.

description 4/6

Once in a while, disarms a random enemy for 4 sec and deals 75000 damage to them over that period of time. Once in a while, throws an enchanted card at the enemy mage with the greatest spell power. The card deals 60000 damage, reducing the target’s magic armor by 25% and increasing the cooldown time of the target’s weapon ability by 100%. Has a 16% chance of increasing the weapon’s cooldown time by 200%.

description 6/6

Once in a while, disarms a random enemy for 4 sec and deals 95000 damage to them over that period of time. Once in a while, throws an enchanted card at the enemy mage with the greatest spell power. The card deals 80000 damage, reducing the target’s magic armor by 35% and increasing the cooldown time of the target’s weapon ability by 150%. Has a 16% chance of increasing the weapon’s cooldown time by 350%. Once in a while, reduces the spell power of all enemy mages by 75%. After 3 sec, the spell power is restored, and the enemy mage with the greatest spell power takes damage equal to 150% of the total spell power reduction. 75% of the damage done to the main target is also dealt to enemies within a small radius. The damage this ability deals to the main target cannot be absorbed by invulnerability, shields, or even a magic astral plane. The enemy killed by this ability cannot be resurrected for 6 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Damage from the Cardsharper’s disarming ability is also dealt in a small radius around the main target.

description 4/6

Damage from the Cardsharper’s disarming ability is also dealt in a small radius around the main target. When Cardsharper throws an enchanted card, they throw 2 more cards at other enemies with the greatest spell power.

description 6/6

Damage from the Cardsharper’s disarming ability is also dealt in a small radius around the main target. When Cardsharper throws an enchanted card, they throw 2 more cards at other enemies with the greatest spell power. Damage from the Cardsharper’s ability that reduces spell power is increased by 50%.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Cardsharper cannot be disarmed.

description 4/6

Cardsharper cannot be disarmed. After hitting an enemy with an enchanted card, Cardsharper gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 100% of the target’s spell power to 100% of the Cardsharper’s own spell power added together. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Cardsharper cannot be disarmed. After hitting an enemy with an enchanted card, Cardsharper gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 100% of the target’s spell power to 100% of the Cardsharper’s own spell power added together. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec. When Cardsharper reduces the spell power of all enemy mages, they gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 100% of the spell power lost by the enemy mages. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

An enemy disarmed by the Cardsharper’s ability also cannot use the artifact’s abilities for 3 sec.

description 4/6

An enemy disarmed by the Cardsharper’s ability also cannot use the artifact’s abilities for 4 sec. The additional increase of the weapon ability’s cooldown from the Enchanted Card triggers every time.

description 6/6

An enemy disarmed by the Cardsharper’s ability also cannot use the artifact’s abilities for 5 sec. The additional increase of the weapon ability’s cooldown from the Enchanted Card triggers every time. When Cardsharper reduces the spell power of all enemy mages, it increases their own spell power by 150% of the total spell power reduced by the ability. Lasts for 5 sec.

Materials

Lucky Joker
Attributes of Magic
